fields.Name: YM - Get Members
fields.Description: Retrieves member data from YourMembership with pagination support

fields.Name: ClientID
fields.Description: YM client/site identifier

fields.Name: APIKey
fields.Description: YM API key (or set BIZAPPS_YM_{ClientID}_API_KEY env var)

fields.Name: APIPassword
fields.Description: YM API password (or set BIZAPPS_YM_{ClientID}_API_PASSWORD env var)

fields.Name: MaxResults
fields.Description: Maximum number of records to return (default 1000)

fields.Name: Members
fields.Description: Array of member records from YourMembership

fields.Name: TotalCount
fields.Description: Total number of records retrieved
Members retrieved successfully
Error communicating with the YourMembership API

fields.Name: YM - Full Sync
fields.Description: Syncs YourMembership data into MJ database tables in the specified schema. Fetches all (or selected) endpoints and upserts records into SQL tables.

fields.Name: ClientID
fields.Description: YM client/site identifier

fields.Name: APIKey
fields.Description: YM API key (or set BIZAPPS_YM_{ClientID}_API_KEY env var)

fields.Name: APIPassword
fields.Description: YM API password (or set BIZAPPS_YM_{ClientID}_API_PASSWORD env var)

fields.Name: SchemaName
fields.Description: SQL schema to create/use for YM data tables

fields.Name: Endpoints
fields.Description: Comma-separated list of endpoints to sync (empty = all). Options: Members, Events, EventRegistrations, Donations, Orders, Products, Groups, MemberTypes, Memberships

fields.Name: FullRefresh
fields.Description: Set to true to truncate tables before syncing (default: false for incremental upsert)

fields.Name: SyncResult
fields.Description: Full sync result object with per-endpoint details

fields.Name: TotalRecordsSynced
fields.Description: Total number of records synced across all endpoints

fields.Name: EndpointResults
fields.Description: Per-endpoint sync results with record counts and timing
All endpoints synced successfully
Sync completed but some endpoints had errors
Sync failed with an unexpected error
A required parameter was not provided
ContextUser is required but was not provided
No database provider configured in the MJ runtime
